title: Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Taylor - Vice President of Investor Relations Devin Stockfish - President and CEO David Wold - Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants George Staphos - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Kurt Yinger - D.A. Davidson Anthony Pettinari - Citi Susan Maklari - Goldman Sachs Michael Roxland - Truist Securities Paul Quinn - RBC Capital Markets Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Ketan Mamtora - BMO Capital Markets Operator Greetings, and welcome to Weyerhaeuser Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q3 Earnings Meet, Sales Miss, Both Fall Y/Y
text: Weyerhaeuser's (WY) third-quarter 2023 results reflect lower year-over-year segmental results but improved sequential results. Operational disruptions and lower sales volumes hurt results.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q3 Earnings
text: The headline numbers for Weyerhaeuser (WY) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q3 Earnings Match Estimates
text: Weyerhaeuser (WY) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.33 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.42 per share a year ago.

title: Weyerhaeuser Reports Third Quarter Results
text: Achieved net earnings of $239 million, or $0.33 per diluted share Generated Adjusted EBITDA of $509 million, a 9 percent increase compared with second quarter 2023 Received approval for the company's first forest carbon credits SEATTLE , Oct. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) today reported third quarter net earnings of $239 million, or 33 cents per diluted share, on net sales of $2.0 billion. This compares with net earnings of $310 million, or 42 cents per diluted share, on net sales of $2.3 billion for the same period last year and net earnings of $230 million for second quarter 2023.

title: Analysts Estimate Weyerhaeuser (WY) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Weyerhaeuser (WY) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Weyerhaeuser And West Fraser Lead The Pack In Timber/Lumber
text: Timber REITs are trading at discounts to their asset value, presenting buying opportunities. Investment in timber REITs involves different segments with their own drivers and valuation methods. Housing construction is the largest driver of wood product demand, and the industry is currently undersupplied.

title: 3 Anti-AI Stocks for Old-Fashioned Investors
text: While innovations such as artificial intelligence have taken off, the “analog” segment of the market – the anti-AI stocks if you will – have fell by the wayside. Frankly, that's an understandable dynamic given the paradigm-shifting potential of advanced technologies.
